title: salix × davosiana
intro: Salix × davosiana, also known as the hybrid willow, is a plant species resulting from the cross between Salix purpurea and Salix alba. The medicinal properties of Salix × davosiana include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Salix × davosiana include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
